B) The load balancer will terminate the failed instance. C) The load balancer will automatically replace the failed instance. D) The load balancer will return 504 Gateway Timeout errors until the instance is replaced. 1 x THIS is what really matters, answer- Repeating blocks are ‘word fluff” unique keywords.
